name: Claude Code
description: Anthropic's agentic coding assistant. Closed-source, no public repo.

name: Gemini CLI
description: Google's open-source Gemini terminal agent. Apache 2.0. Free tier: 1000 req/day.

name: Codex
description: OpenAI Codex CLI. Open-source (MIT), built in Rust. Requires ChatGPT Plus or API key.

name: Opencode
description: Open-source coding agent (MIT). Provider-agnostic TUI + desktop app. 120k+ stars.

name: Aider
description: Open-source AI pair programmer (Apache 2.0). Works with any LLM. Git-native. 42k+ stars.

name: Deep Agents CLI
description: LangChain's open-source deep agent harness (MIT). Planning, subagents, persistent memory. Provider-agnostic.
